title: indigofera litoralis
intro: Indigofera litoralis, also known as the coastal indigo or coastal bird's-climber, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Indigofera litoralis include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, providing benefits such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and soothing digestive issues. Indigofera litoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
